title: Mr. Farts – Funny Fart Putty for Kids – Party Bag Fillers & Slime Noise Maker – Prank Toy – Great for Birthdays, Stocking Fillers & Gag Gifts
features: KIDS PUTTY - Fart putty is just one of those fun things that kids love. Enjoy the feeling of cold green slime to make silly fart sounds that will make everyone giggle! The slime is non-toxic and safe for kids so you can enjoy the farting fun with peace of mind. It’s a hilarious and harmless way to keep them entertained.

PERFECT PRANK TOYS - Kids will love pranking their friends with this fart slime. This slime putty is the perfect toy for boys and girls who love playing practical jokes! The putty arrives in a small, reusable pot which allows you to easily take it with you on the go and make any moment a funny one.

MAKES FART NOISES - This unique putty is specially formulated to make hilarious fart noises and provide endless hours of juvenile entertainment. Our green fart putty is a blast to play with – just poke it and squish it into the pot to make funny fart noises!

SENSORY PLAY - Not only does Mr. Farts fart putty provide lots of laughter but it’s also great for sensory play, tactile stimulation and promoting fine motor skills. This encourages kids to engage in creative play by squishing, squeezing and poking the slime.

IDEAL FOR - Mr. Farts fart putty slime is a great choice to use for kids party bags or for Halloween prizes. This is also the ideal, cheap Birthday present or Christmas stocking stuffer for all kids to enjoy.
